hasPart.name: Children's book "Camang and Friends"
hasPart.insight: A complete children's book project titled "Camang and Friends," featuring 12 illustrations that tell a cohesive story. This represents the artist's most comprehensive narrative project, demonstrating both illustration and book design skills.

hasPart.name: Animals - a cat with flowerpots
hasPart.insight: An extensive series depicting cats among flowerpots, combining the artist's love of animals with botanical elements. The 11-image series demonstrates consistent character design across multiple compositions.

hasPart.name: Art Brand poster_Rabbit&Snake
hasPart.insight: An art brand poster series featuring rabbit and snake characters, blending fine art sensibility with commercial design. The contrasting animal subjects create visual tension and narrative depth.

hasPart.name: Exchanging my talents for traveling in Ireland.
hasPart.insight: A travel illustration project documenting the artist's experience of exchanging creative talents for travel opportunities in Ireland. This project uniquely combines personal narrative with illustration.

hasPart.name: Knitting Spider illustration
hasPart.insight: An imaginative illustration of a knitting spider, transforming a typically feared creature into a charming, industrious character. The concept plays on the natural web-spinning ability of spiders reimagined as knitting.

hasPart.name: pen drawing.
hasPart.insight: A collection of pen drawings demonstrating the artist's foundational skills in traditional media. The raw, direct quality of pen work reveals confident linework and observational ability.

hasPart.name: Self-portrait 2019
hasPart.insight: A self-portrait from 2019 that offers an intimate glimpse into the artist's self-perception and artistic identity. Self-portraiture serves as both practice and personal expression.

hasPart.name: Blue Dog
hasPart.insight: A character study of a blue dog, exploring form and expression through a series of illustrations.

hasPart.name: Random Pots
hasPart.insight: A playful exploration of ceramic pot designs with character and personality.

hasPart.name: Flower Illustration
hasPart.insight: A collection of flower illustrations exploring form, color, and natural beauty.

hasPart.name: Animated Nature Series
hasPart.insight: An animated series bringing natural scenes to life through motion and color.
